scripts.app:payment-api:package:
rm -rf dist/payment-api-package dist/payment-api.zip && mkdir -p dist/payment-api-package && rolldown -c rolldown.payment-api.config.mjs && printf '{"type":"module"}
' > dist/payment-api-package/package.json && cd dist/payment-api-package && zip -r ../payment-api.zip index.js package.json
scripts.floci:deploy:all: pnpm app:payment-api:package && pnpm platform:deploy -- --env dev --venture venture --target floci --services customer-records,payment-api
scripts.floci:redeploy:ddb: pnpm floci:reset:ddb && pnpm platform:deploy -- --env dev --venture venture --target floci --services customer-records
